behavior_in_task_description.reason: All file paths, class names (Qwen2VLTextConfig, Qwen2_5_VLTextConfig, ColQwen2Config, ColModernVBertConfig, ModernVBertForMaskedLM), and the tie_word_embeddings field are named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what's broken (field shouldn't exist, hack is dead code, missing type annotation) without specifying exact replacement code.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check absence of tie_word_embeddings class field, absence of propagation hack text, and presence of any type annotation — not specific types or names.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests invoke ruff, check_copies.py, check_inits.py, and other repo utilities via subprocess, plus AST structural checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub can't satisfy the repo_lint/copies/inits checks plus AST field-absence and annotation-presence assertions simultaneously.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Text config field removal, hack removal in both composite configs, and type annotation in both modeling files are all tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have header comments grouping them into gates (repo_tests, static) and fail_to_pass sections with tags like [pr_diff].

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code cleanup, not structured data production.

no_typos.reason: Paths and class names match actual transformers repository structure.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files and classes but this is part of the task context; no specific line numbers or exact replacement code given.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not an agentmd/config edit.
